Advisor: Great. And then state of residence—what state do you file from most of the time?

Advisor: Got it—thanks. Next one is risk tolerance. When markets get choppy, do you see yourselves as conservative, moderate, or aggressive overall?
Client 1: Moderate—definitely moderate.
Advisor: Okay. And last admin-ish item: how should I describe the relationship channel—are we working together as an RIA, a registered investment advisor?
Client 2: Yes—RIA (registered investment advisor).
Advisor: Perfect. One second—just noting those down.
